## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage — Needs Manual Review

<details>
<summary>🏷️ Label Decision</summary>

- **Candidate labels considered:** No viable category+service label pair could be identified. The issue title ("Smartrexs Chain network") does not reference any Azure SDK package, service, or `/sdk/` path. The issue body contains only a URL to an unrelated third-party JavaScript library (polkadot-js).
- **Confidence blockers:** The issue does not clearly name or reference any specific Azure SDK package, service, or `/sdk/` path — this is a required criterion for a confident prediction. No category (Client/Mgmt/Provisioning) or service label could be inferred.
- **Outcome:** Applied `needs-triage` — could not confidently predict labels.

</details>
